title: Twitter @mixedbreadai
summary: The multi vector embeddings are created using our SOTA retrieval model mxbai-wholembed. It supports text, audio, video on over 300 languages. A key innovation is the dynamic vector allocation, which lets the model dynamically decide the amounts of vectors it needs to represent https://t.co/w3RviRYsAw

title: Hackernews Introducing ChatGPT and Whisper APIs (openai.com)
Twitter @musicaoriginal2
Hackernews Universal Speech Model (research.google)
summary: Research paper Request API Access Universal Speech Model (USM) is a family of state-of-the-art speech models with 2B parameters trained on 12 million hours of speech and 28 billion sentences of text, spanning 300+ languages. USM, which is for use in YouTube (e.g., for closed captions), can perform automatic speech
